name: Destin Golf Club
address: 150 Industrial Park Rd UNIT 10, Destin, FL 32541
about: Destin Golf Simulator is a premier indoor golf venue in Destin, Florida, equipped with 4 state-of-the-art golf simulator bays. The facility combines high-quality golf technology with a laid-back, family-friendly atmosphere, offering a convenient and accessible environment for the game of golf year-round. Operating on a dual pricing model for off-peak and peak hours, the venue caters to a wide range of patrons, from families and tourists to avid golfers seeking practice or entertainment, with special perks and discounts for members.
why_golfers_like_it: No sunburns or rainouts in a climate-controlled space
ProTee VX Launch Monitor for detailed shot tracking
Family-friendly atmosphere suitable for all skill levels
Exclusive member access to leagues and events

food_and_drink.notes: Available on-site with bar credits included in higher-tier memberships
Available on-site with bar credits included in higher-tier memberships

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual high-speed cameras track swing and ball flight in real time

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs or rentals may be available on-site.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The facility offers food and drinks for purchase, including bar credits for members. Outside food or drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies depending on simulator software and pace of play, but typically takes 1.5 to 2 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Destin Golf Simulator is suitable for all ages and skill levels, making it a great option for families.
